title: RuntimeRecalibrationActivationPolicyV1
description: Declarative activation policy for runtime recalibration (M28). Defines per-bucket activation rules. Default is conservative: all buckets disabled. This policy, combined with RecalibrationGateV1, determines whether recalibration is applied at runtime.

defaultEnabled.description: Default activation state for all buckets (false = conservative default)

scope.description: Which heads to apply recalibration to when enabled: outcome (W/D/L), policy (move probabilities), or both

bucketOverrides.description: Per-bucket overrides of the default activation state

notes.description: Optional notes about this policy (for audit/debugging)

enabled.description: Whether recalibration is enabled for this bucket

scope.description: Per-bucket scope override (null = use policy default)
